top_signals.title: Episode 87: Haydock, Irish Guineas and Hong Kong, plus special guest Karl Burke
top_signals.summary: Tom Marriott and Bill Esdaile are back to preview the weekend’s action with domestic action from Haydock, where Karl Burke joined to discuss leading hope on the card Venetian Sun as well as others, alongside the Irish 2000 and 1000 Guineas from the Curragh on Saturday and Sunday and Wally Pyrah joins with his best [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
